subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Name, the All-Compassionate, to spread out for him who hath ascended unto Thee the carpet of mercy and forgiveness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی اسئلک باسمک العطوف بان تبسط لمن صعد الیک بساط الرحمة و الغفران
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for the departed
